SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.ports

Class BrokerPrivilegedInboundPort

java.lang.Object
java.rmi.server.RemoteObject
java.rmi.server.RemoteServer
java.rmi.server.UnicastRemoteObject
fr.sorbonne_u.components.AbstractPort
fr.sorbonne_u.components.ports.AbstractInboundPort
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.ports.BrokerPublishingInboundPort
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.ports.BrokerPrivilegedInboundPort
All Implemented Interfaces:
fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.ComponentInterface, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.OfferedCI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.RequiredCI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.ports.InboundPortI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.ports.PortI, PrivilegedClientCI, PublishingCI, Serializable, Remote
public class BrokerPrivilegedInboundPort extends BrokerPublishingInboundPort implements PrivilegedClientCI
Port inbound exposant les opérations de gestion des canaux privilégiés du broker via l'interface PrivilegedClientCI.

Propriétaire : Broker.

Comme PrivilegedClientCI étend PublishingCI, ce port hérite également des opérations publish / asyncPublishAndNotify via BrokerPublishingInboundPort.

Convention : les exceptions métier déclarées sur la CI sont propagées telles quelles ; toute autre Exception technique est encapsulée dans une RemoteException. : les opérations void véritablement fire-and-forget (modifyAuthorisedUsers(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String), destroyChannel(java.lang.String, java.lang.String)) sont dispatchées sur l'executor de réception ; leurs exceptions sont logguées (l'appelant ne peut pas les observer). Les opérations dont la sémantique synchrone importe à l'appelant (createChannel(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String) : remontée de quota / unicité, destroyChannelNow(java.lang.String, java.lang.String) : disparition garantie au retour) restent basées sur handleRequest.

See Also:

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BrokerPrivilegedInboundPort(fr.sorbonne_u.components.ComponentI owner)
    Constructeur sans URI explicite — owner doit être un Broker.
    BrokerPrivilegedInboundPort(String uri, fr.sorbonne_u.components.ComponentI owner)
    Constructeur à URI explicite — le broker dérive cette URI depuis son URI de réflexion.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    channelQuotaReached(String receptionPortURI)
    return true if the component registered under receptionPortURI has reached its channel quota.
    void
    createChannel(String receptionPortURI, String channel, String autorisedUsers)
    Création de canal privilégié — synchrone car l'appelant a besoin de la réponse métier (quota / unicité) immédiatement.
    void
    destroyChannel(String receptionPortURI, String channel)
    Destruction asynchrone — le canal devient invisible mais son nettoyage profond se fait après vidage du compteur in-flight.
    void
    destroyChannelNow(String receptionPortURI, String channel)
    Destruction synchrone — l'appelant attend la suppression effective de tout l'état du canal.
    boolean
    hasCreatedChannel(String receptionPortURI, String channel)
    return true if the component has created channel.
    void
    modifyAuthorisedUsers(String receptionPortURI, String channel, String autorisedUsers)
    Modification asynchrone de la regex authorisedUsers.

  • Method Details

    • hasCreatedChannel

      public boolean hasCreatedChannel(String receptionPortURI, String channel) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: PrivilegedClientCI
      return true if the component has created channel.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      hasCreatedChannel in interface PrivilegedClientCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - channel to be tested.
      Returns:
      true if the component has created channel.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • PrivilegedClientCI.hasCreatedChannel(String, String)

    • channelQuotaReached

      public boolean channelQuotaReached(String receptionPortURI) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: PrivilegedClientCI
      return true if the component registered under receptionPortURI has reached its channel quota.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      channelQuotaReached in interface PrivilegedClientCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      Returns:
      true if the component registered under receptionPortURI has reached its channel quota.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • PrivilegedClientCI.channelQuotaReached(String)

    • createChannel

      public void createChannel(String receptionPortURI, String channel, String autorisedUsers) throws Exception
      Création de canal privilégié — synchrone car l'appelant a besoin de la réponse métier (quota / unicité) immédiatement.
      Specified by:
      createChannel in interface PrivilegedClientCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - identifier of the requesting component i.e., URI of its inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of the channel to be created.
      autorisedUsers - regular expression that matches the URIs of components that must be authorised to use the new channel.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • PrivilegedClientCI.createChannel(String, String, String)

    • modifyAuthorisedUsers

      public void modifyAuthorisedUsers(String receptionPortURI, String channel, String autorisedUsers) throws Exception
      Modification asynchrone de la regex authorisedUsers.
      Specified by:
      modifyAuthorisedUsers in interface PrivilegedClientCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - identifier of the requesting component i.e., URI of its inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of the channel.
      autorisedUsers - regular expression that matches the URIs of components that must be authorised to use the new channel.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • PrivilegedClientCI.modifyAuthorisedUsers(String, String, String)
